xBRIEFInfo.description: Scope xBRIEF ingested from GitHub issue #65

narratives.Overview:
## Request

Doom Bell feels too low — raise it one octave (+12 semitones). Keep the existing church-bell partial ratios and long ring.

## Current notes (`src/audio/voices.ts`)

| Voice | Fundamental | Hz | Partials (relative) |
|-------|-------------|-----|---------------------|
| Doom Bell | F2 | 87.31 | hum 0.5, prime 1, tierce 1.2, quint 1.5, nominal 2.0, +2.67 |

Comment in code: church-bell voicing an octave-and-a-half below Bell, ~16s ring.

## Target notes (+12 semitones)

| Voice | Fundamental | Hz |
|-------|-------------|-----|
| Doom Bell | F3 | 174.61 |

Keep the same relative partials (`[0.5, 0.5]`, `[1, 1]`, `[1.2, 0.55]`, `[1.5, 0.28]`, `[2.0, 0.22]`, `[2.67, 0.08]`) and duration (~16s). Update the `struck(...)` fundamental and the comment that currently says F2.

Also update the Chime comment that references “doom bell (F2)” if it still cites the old pitch.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Doom Bell fundamental is F3 (174.61 Hz) — one octave above current F2
- [ ] Relative partial structure and ring length are unchanged
- [ ] Bell / Chime voices are untouched unless a follow-up asks otherwise
- [ ] Comments in `voices.ts` match the new pitch
- [ ] Quick listen in-app confirms the higher strike without breaking the long decay

## Refs

Same class of change as Foghorn octave raise (#58).
